variant_name: 高父 — 书房辞官时的决断长者
trigger: 在高府书房中，高父决定辞官避祸，并安排女儿相看门生蒋晟，展现出从官员身份向家族守护者身份倾斜的关键状态。

appearance_delta.face: 神色比前期更凝重，眉心压痕明显，显出为家事与仕途两难所累
appearance_delta.body: 伏案或起身时可见轻微疲态，胸口旧疾的负担感更强
appearance_delta.hair: 束冠仍整肃，但略显劳顿感
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 文臣气质中多出果断，像主动放下仕途换取家宅平安

costume_override.outfit: 半正式文官袍服或书房内便于写奏折的整肃深色袍服

visual_reference: middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father in a study, writing a resignation memorial with brush and ink, gentle refined face marked by stress and age lines, black hair mixed with gray under a formal crown, dark teal and gray-brown robe, official seal and memorial paper on desk, determined yet weary expression, realistic historical Chinese interior
